name: Huatai Tianjin Securities Asset Management Company Ltd. -  HTZJ Sci-Tech Investment 3 Year Class Mix
summary: Huatai Tianjin Securities Asset Management Company Ltd. -  HTZJ Sci-Tech Investment 3 Year Class Mix is a fund managed by Huatai Tianjin Securities Asset Management Company that focuses on investing in companies involved in science and technology with a mixed allocation to stocks and bonds, and a three-year investment horizon. The fund aims to capture the growth potential of the technology sector while managing risk through diversification.
